creator: james.wright@digital-chaos.com
text:
Latest stable version on GitHub now seems to be 2.0.6433
https://github.com/jitsi/jitsi-meet/releases

Although this version number seems quite different from the latest tarball on the master site: https://download.jitsi.org/jitsi-meet/src/jitsi-meet-1.0.5472.tar.bz2
